title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh, Associate Professor at CU Boulder, advocates teaching AI fundamentals by hand at human speed rather than adopting the latest tools. He argues that focusing on mathematical foundations creates enduring skills that survive industry hype cycles, and cautions against an "AI-native" approach that treats AI as a transformative agent rather than a tool shaped by human intention.
